Title: View Store Details
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Store exists in system
Steps:
1. Navigate to More > Stores
2. Select existing store and click on it
Expected Result:
- System displays Store details blade in editable format
- All widgets visible (Settings, Aggregation properties, Assets, SEO, etc.)
- Store information displayed correctly

Title: Add New Store
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Stores Module installed, At least one catalog exists
Steps:
1. Navigate to More > Stores
2. Click Add button
3. Fill required fields: Code (alphanumeric no spaces), Name, Select Catalog from dropdown, Select Default language, Select Default currency, Select State
4. Click Create
Expected Result:
- System opens Stores module with active Add button
- New Store blade displays with disabled Create button initially
- Code field validates alphanumeric without spaces
- Name field is required
- All dropdowns populated correctly
- Create button becomes active after required fields filled
- New store created and displayed in Stores list
- Store details displayed in editable format

Title: Edit Store Details - Basic Fields
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Store exists in system
Steps:
1. Go to More > Stores > Select store and click
2. Edit Store name (alphanumeric validation)
3. Edit Catalog from dropdown
4. Edit State from dropdown
5. Enter Store URL (optional field)
6. Edit Default language from dropdown
7. Click Save
Expected Result:
- System opens Store details in editable format
- Code is label (not editable)
- Store name accepts alphanumeric only
- Catalog dropdown shows available catalogs
- State dropdown shows available states
- Store URL field accepts valid URLs
- Default language updates correctly
- All changes saved successfully

Title: Edit Store Details - Languages
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Store exists in system
Steps:
1. Open Store details
2. Add new language (follow Add new state process)
3. Edit Additional language - select from dropdown
4. Select multiple additional languages
5. Delete languages using X icon
6. Save changes
Expected Result:
- New language added to list and dropdown
- Additional language selected and displayed
- Multiple languages can be selected
- Languages deleted successfully and removed from field
- All changes persist after save

Title: Edit Store Details - Currencies
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Store exists in system
Steps:
1. Open Store details
2. Edit Default currency from dropdown
3. Click Edit icon next to Default currency
4. Edit currency details (Code, Name, Exchange rate, Symbol, Custom formatting)
5. Save currency changes
6. Add new Default currency: Click Edit icon > Add > Fill form (Code required, Name required, Is primary disabled) > Create
7. Edit Additional currency - select from dropdown (multiple selection possible)
8. Add new additional currency
Expected Result:
- Default currency updates correctly
- Currency details blade opens with all fields
- Currency Code and Name are required
- Is primary disabled by default
- Exchange rate, Symbol, Custom formatting are optional
- New currency created and available for selection
- Multiple additional currencies can be selected
- New currencies saved and displayed correctly

Title: Edit Store Details - Linked Stores
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Multiple stores exist in system
Steps:
1. Open Store details
2. Click Linked stores field
3. Select one or more stores from dropdown
4. Click Delete icon to remove linked stores
5. Save changes
Expected Result:
- Linked stores field displays dropdown with available stores
- Multiple stores can be selected
- Selected stores displayed in field
- Delete icon removes linked store from field
- Changes saved successfully

Title: Delete Store

Steps:
1. Navigate to More > Stores
2. Select Store_1
3. Click Delete button
4. Confirm deletion
Expected Result:

- Confirmation dialog appears
- Store_1 deleted after confirmation
- Store removed from list

2. Click Open in Browser button
Expected Result:
- Admin redirected to Store_1 storefront page in new browser tab

Title: Save Store Changes

2. Make changes to store settings
3. Click Save button
Expected Result:

Title: Edit Aggregation Properties - Add/Remove Properties
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Store exists in system
Steps:
1. Open Store details > Click Aggregation properties widget
2. Select property from left list and click to add
3. Click X icon on Selected properties to remove
4. Click OK to save
Expected Result:
- Filtering properties blade opens with Available and Selected properties lists
- Selected property moves to Selected properties list
- Property removed from Selected list when deleted
- Changes saved successfully

Title: Edit Aggregation Properties - Property Details
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Store exists, Aggregation properties configured
Steps:
1. Open Aggregation properties
2. Select property from Selected properties list
3. Review property details: Name (label), Aggregation type dropdown (Attribute/Range), Aggregation size (Attribute only), Allowed values
4. Enter new value in Allowed values > Click blue field
5. Delete existing values using X icon
6. Click OK to save
7. Make changes and click Cancel > Confirm cancellation
Expected Result:
- Property details blade opens in editable format
- Property name is label (not editable)
- Aggregation type dropdown shows Attribute and Range
- Aggregation size visible only for Attribute type
- Allowed values editable (add/remove)
- New value added successfully
- Existing values deleted
- Changes saved on OK
- Cancel shows warning message
- Changes not saved on Cancel confirmation

Title: Edit Aggregation Properties - Edit Attribute with Dictionary

2. Click Add button in Allowed values > Select value_1 from dropdown
3. Remove value_1 using X icon
4. Click Add > Check value_1 in dictionary
5. Add all values from dictionary
6. Remove one value
7. Remove all values > Save
Expected Result:
- Property details blade opens with Aggregation type Attribute
- Allowed values shows Add button
- Value_1 added from dictionary dropdown
- Value_1 removed from field
- Value_1 available in dictionary
- All dictionary values can be added
- Add button disappears when all values added
- Add button reappears after removing value
- All values removed successfully

4. Remove all values > Save
Expected Result:
- Property details blade opens with Aggregation type Range
- Price range bounds field editable
- Add button displays dropdown with available values
- New value added to field
- Value_1 removed from field
- All changes saved
- All values removed successfully
- Add button displayed after deleting all values

Title: Enable Email Verification
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Email confirmation notification active, Template_1 set for notification, User_1 created in Store_1 with Email_1
Steps:
1. Go to Stores module > Open Store_1
2. Open Settings blade
3. Switch on Enable email address verification toggle
4. Click OK and Save
5. Reopen Settings blade and verify toggle state
6. Login to Storefront as User_1
7. Go to My Account > Profile
8. Change Email_1 to Email_2
9. Check Email_2 inbox
10. Open verification email
11. Click verification link
Expected Result:
- Enable email address verification toggle switched on
- Setting saved in ON position
- Toggle persists in ON position after reopen
- Email address verification notification sent to Email_2 inbox
- Email received with verification link
- User redirected to email verification page after clicking link
- Email verification process completed

Title: Disable Email Verification
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Email confirmation notification active, Template_1 set, User_1 created in Store_1 with Email_1
Steps:
1. Go to Stores module > Open Store_1
2. Open Settings blade
3. Switch off Enable email address verification toggle
4. Click OK and Save
5. Reopen Settings blade and verify toggle state
6. Login to Storefront as User_1
7. Go to My Account > Profile
8. Change Email_1 to Email_2
9. Check Email_2 inbox
Expected Result:
- Enable email address verification toggle switched off
- Setting saved in OFF position
- Toggle persists in OFF position after reopen
- No verification email sent to Email_2 inbox
- Email address changed without verification

Title: Disable Email Verification - Statuses Unchanged
Preconditions: Admin on Store page, Verification_link sent to User_1, User_1 assigned to Store_1, Enable email address verification set to TRUE
Steps:
1. Send verification link to User_1
2. Before User_1 verifies, disable Enable email address verification in Store settings
3. Save
4. User_1 clicks verification link
Expected Result:
- Email not verified
- Error message shown
- Disabling feature does not change existing verification statuses
- Sent links remain valid or become invalid (verify expected behavior)
